attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  ,NATL.SS_CODE
  ,NRT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
  ,CAST ( NRT.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
  ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                      
  ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
  ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
  ,NRT.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
  ,NRT.GL_POSTED_DT                  
  ,CASE WHEN EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN -9999  ELSE EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   END SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
  , 'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
  ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT ,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
  ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NRT.RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT ,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
  ,'RT' AS SOURCE_CODE 
  ,CASE WHEN NATL.SS_CODE='OOD' THEN EORCTLG.SEGMENT4 
  ELSE ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
  END FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
  ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
  ,CASE WHEN NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE 'XAAS_ADJ' END AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
  
  /*  EXTRA COLUMNS STARTS HERE */  
  , NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
/* ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY18 PRMADDAL*/
  ,/*CASE WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
     CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
	 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Changes*/
	 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING)' AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	 )
       THEN COALESCE(NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
  END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  /*,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE */
  ,NRT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
  ,NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
 
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,NAT.BK_DEAL_ID
  ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
  ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
  /*  EXTRA COLUMNS ENDS HERE */ 
  
  ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  
  /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
  ,CASE WHEN NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD = 'ERP' THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE 'XAAS_ADJ' END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
  ,NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/ 
 ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE /*Q1FY18 SOT CHANGES*/
  ,NRT.POB_TYPE_CD
  FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD ON NRT.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE         AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0   
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL      ON NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  /*ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY18*/
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    ON NRT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC    ON   NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NRT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  =   COALESCE(NRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, -9999) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
   /*SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT*/
  
  WHERE NRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' AND  (NRT.EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT) 
  IN (SELECT EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
    FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
    ON NRT.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE 
    WHERE 
    RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
    AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
    /*AND NATL.SS_CODE='CG'*/
    AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
    OR (AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 ) )
    GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
   BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,GL_DIST.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,GL_DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,GL_DIST.SS_CODE                       
   ,GL_DIST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,GL_DATETIME                   
   ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
   ,RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
   ,RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
   ,CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             
   ,GL_POSTED_DT                  
   ,SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT  
   ,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE
   ,RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
   ,RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
   ,'QTC/BV' AS SOURCE_CODE
   ,CASE WHEN GL_DIST.SS_CODE='OOD' THEN EORCTLG.SEGMENT4 
   ELSE GLCC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
   END FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,NFC.RU_BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
   ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
   
   /*  EXTRA COLUMNS STARTS HERE */ 
   , AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   	 /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY18 PRMADDAL*/
   ,/*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
      CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')
	  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND TRXLINE.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))
	  )/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	  
       THEN COALESCE(TRXLINE.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(AR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
   END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,AR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   , TRXLINE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
/*  , TRXLINE.RU_BK_XAAS_SALES_ORDER_ID_INT*/   
  ,(CASE WHEN SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <0 THEN GL_DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,AR.BK_DEAL_ID
   ,AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
   ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,-999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   ,'NULL' AS ORIG_SS_CD
   ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
   /*  EXTRA COLUMNS ENDS HERE */ 
    ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  , CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND AR.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
   , TRXLINE.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/   
, GL_DIST.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE /*Q1FY18 XAAS CHANGES*/
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GL_DIST
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY ON GL_DIST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
      AND GL_DIST.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   
   
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE TRXLINE     ON GL_DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=TRXLINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND TRXLINE.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'N'
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = TRXLINE.AR_TRX_KEY
  
  

 /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE                 
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = AR.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLCC ON GL_DIST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = GLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  /*Q1FY15 OA */ 
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL   
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = GL_DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = GL_DIST.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
   WHERE  ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='REV'
   AND ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG='N'  AND 
   FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<= 0  AND 
   GL_DIST.SS_CODE NOT IN ('CG','CDC') /* added as part of cdc Q4FY18*/
   
  /*Q1FY15 OA  Donot  consider the GI DIST records of SUB SKU TRX LINES*/ 
    AND ((NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE = 'Y' )
        OR (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG <> 'Y'))   
     
    AND (GL_DIST.AR_TRX_KEY, GL_DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) IN 
     (SELECT GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_KEY, GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GL_DIST1
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY1 ON GL_DIST1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY1.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
         AND GL_DIST1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY1.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_KEY 
     WHERE  RFMY1.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <= 1 AND 
         AR.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
         AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='UNEARN'
         AND GL_DIST1.SS_CODE NOT IN ('CG','CDC')   /* added as part of cdc Q4FY18*/
     GROUP BY 1 ,2)

SELECT
   NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,NATLGD.SS_CODE                       
   ,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,NATLGD.GL_DATETIME                   
   ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
   /*,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE NULL END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)  ELSE NULL END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
   */
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)   ELSE 0.0000  END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT 
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)   ELSE 0.0000  END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
   
   ,NATLGD.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             
   ,NATLGD.GL_POSTED_DT                  
   ,NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
   ,NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE 0.00000 END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE 0.00000 END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
  ,NATLGD.SS_CODE AS SOURCE_CODE                                       
   ,CASE WHEN NATLGD.SS_CODE='OOD' THEN EORCTLG.SEGMENT4 
   ELSE ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
   END FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,NFC.RU_BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
   ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
   
   
   , AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY18 PRMADDAL*/
   ,/*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
      CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
	  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')   AND TRXLINE.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS')) /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Changes*/
	  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND TRXLINE.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL'))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	  )
       THEN COALESCE(TRXLINE.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(AR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
    END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,AR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   , TRXLINE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
   ,(CASE WHEN SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <0 THEN NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,AR.BK_DEAL_ID
   ,AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
   ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,-999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
   ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
   
   
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
   
   ,CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND AR.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD    /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
 , TRXLINE.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/
, NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE/*Q1FY18 SOT XAAS Changes*/
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY ON NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
      AND NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA       ON  EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT                 
         AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME               
         AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'                 
         AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA   ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM   AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
         AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID                 
         AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA   ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
         AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID                 
         AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
         AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB    ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID                 AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE TRXLINE     ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=TRXLINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 /*  AND TRXLINE.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'N'  
Commented here as part of Meraki changes and moved this filter to where condiion */
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = TRXLINE.AR_TRX_KEY 
  
   /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE                 
        AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 
        AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = AR.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   
  /*Q1FY15 OA */ 
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL   
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   
  

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC                 
   ON AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE                               
   AND AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'

     ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
     AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
     AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
     ON NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
     ON   NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
     /*ADDED BELOW JOINS TO GET TRX LINE PERCENT START*/
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT DIST.* FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL DIST
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
     ON DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
     WHERE   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO OFFER ATTRIBUTION'
     AND EFAR.LANG = 'US') ERDA
      ON NXOA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = ERDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
      ON ERDA.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 
   AND ERDA.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID /*NRS Change */
       LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID /*END*/
    AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID /*NRS Change */
   WHERE NXOA. ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
      AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' AND  (NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT) 
      IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
      ON NXOA.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE 
      WHERE NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM'
      AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
      AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
   AND NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
     AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
     )
     GROUP BY 1)

SELECT
   NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
   ,NATLGD.SS_CODE                       
   ,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
   ,NATLGD.GL_DATETIME                   
   ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
   /*,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE NULL END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)  ELSE NULL END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
   */
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)   ELSE 0.0000  END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT 
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)- COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)   ELSE 0.0000  END AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
   
   ,NATLGD.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             
   ,NATLGD.GL_POSTED_DT                  
   ,NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
   ,NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE 0.00000 END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ELSE 0.00000 END AS  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
   ,'CDC' AS SOURCE_CODE                                      
   ,CASE WHEN NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC' THEN EORCTLG.SEGMENT4 
   ELSE ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
   END FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,NFC.RU_BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
   ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
   
   
   , AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(AR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q2FY18 PRMADDAL*/
   ,/*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') */
      CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
	  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND TRXLINE.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL')))/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
       THEN COALESCE(TRXLINE.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,-999)
                   ELSE COALESCE(AR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
    END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,AR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   , TRXLINE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
   ,(CASE WHEN SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <0 THEN NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,AR.BK_DEAL_ID
   ,AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
   ,NSOB.CURRENCY_CODE  AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,-999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
   ,NSOB.NAME AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
   
   ,CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND AR.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD    /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
 , TRXLINE.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/
, NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE/*Q1FY18 SOT XAAS Changes*/
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY ON NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
      AND NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA       ON  EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT                 
         AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME               
         AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'                 
         AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA   ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM   AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
         AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID                 
         AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA   ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
         AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID                 
         AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
         AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    )
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
	ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1	
  )ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
	   )  
/*  CDC-end*/       

   
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS NSOB    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID                 AND NSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE TRXLINE     ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=TRXLINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND TRXLINE.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'N'
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = TRXLINE.AR_TRX_KEY 
  
   /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE                 
        AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 
        AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = AR.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   
  /*Q1FY15 OA */ 
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL   
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   
  

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC                 
   ON AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE                               
   AND AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
   
   
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID) 
   AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='REV' 
   AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG='N'
   AND NATLGD.SS_CODE ='CDC'
   AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <= 0
   /*Q1FY15 OA  Donot  consider the GI DIST records of SUB SKU TRX LINES*/ 
   
   AND ((NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' AND NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE = 'Y' )
        OR (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG <> 'Y'))   
   
   AND  (NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY, NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
   IN  (SELECT GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_KEY, GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GL_DIST1
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY1
     ON GL_DIST1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY1.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
     AND GL_DIST1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY1.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR
     ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = GL_DIST1.AR_TRX_KEY
     WHERE 
     RFMY1.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <= 1
     AND AR.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
     AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='UNEARN'
     AND GL_DIST1.SS_CODE ='CDC'
     GROUP BY 1 ,2)
	  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('PP-XAAS','PP-TAX-I-XAAS','PP-CMAPP-XAAS','PP-TAX-CM-XAAS','PP-TAX-DM-XAAS') 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1, EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID DESC) = 1

SELECT -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
     ,NXOA.AR_TRX_KEY                    
     ,NXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     ,NATL.SS_CODE
     ,NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY    
     ,CAST ( NXOA.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT

     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
     RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT

     ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN 'DEBIT' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN 'DEBIT' END DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE

     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'  THEN COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT

     ,NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     ,COALESCE(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
     ,COALESCE(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,COALESCE(NATL1.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
     ,NXOA.TRXL_CURR_CD AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
     ,NXOA.AR_BATCH_SRC_KEY
     ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
    ,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,NXOA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
     ,NXOA.BK_DEAL_ID
     ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
     ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
     ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
     ,NXOA.SS_CD
     ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
     ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
     ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
     ,NXOA.TRX_CLASS_CD AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
     ,NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     ,NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY
     ,NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/
     ,NATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    ,CAST(((ERDA.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT)/COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUB_ALL.AMOUNT= 0 THEN 1 ELSE SUB_ALL.AMOUNT END ,1)) * 100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE   
     ,NXOA.POB_TYPE_CD
	 ,'N' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
     ON NXOA.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
     AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0   
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
     ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON NXOA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
	
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
     ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
     AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
     AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
     ON NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
     ON   NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   /*ADDED BELOW JOINS TO GET TRX LINE PERCENT START*/
      INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_V  ERDA
      ON NXOA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = ERDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_EXT_SUB_V SUB_ALL
      ON ERDA.ATTRIBUTE2 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
      ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID /*END*/  
   AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID /*NRS Change */ 
  WHERE NXOA. ATTRIB_CD IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET')
     AND NXOA.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' AND  (NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT) 
     IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
     FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
     ON NXOA.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE 
     WHERE NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('XAAS','OPL')
     AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
     AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
     AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
     )
     GROUP BY 1)
	 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
     ,NXOA.AR_TRX_KEY                    
     ,NXOA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     ,NATL.SS_CODE
     ,NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY    
     ,CAST ( NXOA.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
     ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                      
     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
     RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'  THEN COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
     ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='DM' THEN 'DEBIT' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='INV' THEN 'DEBIT' END DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
     ,NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT                  
     ,NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
     ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
     ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'  THEN COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NXOA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
     ,NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
     ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
     ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE

     ,NATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  ,CAST(((COALESCE (ERDA.ENTERED_CR,0)-COALESCE(ERDA.ENTERED_DR,0))/COALESCE(CASE WHEN EXT_ALL.AMOUNT= 0 THEN 1 ELSE EXT_ALL.AMOUNT END ,1)) * 100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE   
  ,NXOA.POB_TYPE_CD
  ,NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
     ON NXOA.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
     AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0   
     INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NXOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
     ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON NXOA.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
	 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
     ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
     AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
     AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
     ON NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
     ON   NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
     ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
     /*ADDED BELOW JOINS TO GET TRX LINE PERCENT START*/
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT DIST.* FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL DIST
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAR
     ON DIST.APPLICATION_ID=EFAR.APPLICATION_ID
     WHERE   UPPER(EFAR.APPLICATION_NAME) ='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
     AND EFAR.LANG = 'US') ERDA
      ON NXOA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = ERDA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
       LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
       ON ERDA.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID /*END*/
    AND EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=ERDA.APPLICATION_ID /*NRS Change */
   WHERE NXOA. ATTRIBUTION_TYPE IN ('STANDALONE') AND NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='Y' AND NXOA.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG = 'N'
      AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' AND  (NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT) 
      IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
      ON NXOA.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE 
      WHERE NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD = 'OM'
      AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
      AND ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
   AND NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='Y'
   AND NXOA.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG = 'N'
     AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
     )
     GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
    -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   ,NMRT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   ,NMRT.SS_CD AS SS_CODE

   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD = 'DEBIT' THEN NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ELSE NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   

   ,CAST ( NMRT.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DATETIME
   ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                      
   
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NMRT.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NMRT.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
   
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NMRT.CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NMRT.DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT
   
   ,NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD            
   ,NMRT.GL_POSTED_DT                  
   ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE 
   
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NMRT.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NMRT.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NMRT.CREDIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NMRT.DEBIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
		 
   ,'MERAKI' AS SOURCE_CODE 
   
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN ENGLA_DEBIT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ELSE ENGLA_CREDIT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE END AS REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE  AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD    
   ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   
   , NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
   ,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
   ,CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   
   ,NMRT.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
   ,NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
   ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
   ,COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID  , 'UNKNOWN') 
   ,CASE WHEN NMRT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD='DEBIT' THEN ENGLA_DEBIT.BK_COMPANY_CODE ELSE ENGLA_CREDIT.BK_COMPANY_CODE END AS BK_COMPANY_CODE
   -- OR NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
   ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
   ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD AS ORIG_SS_CD
    ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME    
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER   
   
   ,CASE
   WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV'  AND NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
   
   ,NMRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
   ,NMRT.TRXL_LINE_PCT 
    ,NMRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT   AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   ,NMRT.OFFR_ATTR_PCT   AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
   ,NMRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD  
   ,NMRT.PRODUCT_KEY 
   ,NMRT.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
   ,NMRT.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY 
   FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT 
   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD ON NMRT.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT        ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC ON  NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA_DEBIT  ON  ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NMRT.DEBIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA_CREDIT  ON  ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NMRT.CREDIT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NMRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
   
   INNER JOIN 	(SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV WHERE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK' AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' 
  			AND  UPPER(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' ) DEF_RULE ON 1 = 1
			
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  ON NATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EL_TRX   ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EL_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME  
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY         
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_HEAD_EXT ERP   ON (ERP.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )  
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   		
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CSTMR_ACCT_LOCATR_ASGN_TV ASGN    ON NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = ASGN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 
   			AND ASGN.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR_TV LOC  ON ASGN.LOCATOR_KEY = LOC.LOCATOR_KEY   AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV NDEF    ON NDEF.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = LOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
   			AND NDEF.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'    AND UPPER(NDEF.BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE'

   WHERE     	NMRT.REV_RECOGNIZED_FLG   = 'N'    AND NMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'     AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <= 0    
   AND  (NMRT.AR_TRX_KEY, NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NMRT.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT)    IN 
   (SELECT NMRT_SUB.AR_TRX_KEY, NMRT_SUB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NMRT_SUB.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT
		FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT_SUB
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD      ON NMRT_SUB.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE  
		WHERE  RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1  AND NMRT_SUB.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'UNEARNED_REVENUE'
		 AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )		 	)  
	GROUP BY 1, 2,3 )

-- SQ_WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_ACCRUALS
SELECT 
    -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   ,NART.AR_TRX_KEY                    
   ,NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   ,NART.SS_CD AS SS_CODE

   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE='DEBIT' THEN NART.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
		 ELSE NART.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY END AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   

   ,CAST ( NART.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DATETIME
   ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                      
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NART.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NART.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NART.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NART.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT
   
   ,NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             
   ,NART.GL_POSTED_DT                  
   ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE 
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NART.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NART.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NART.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000)-COALESCE(NART.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT ,0.0000000) 
		 ELSE 0.0000000 END RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
		 
,CASE WHEN  UPPER(NART.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD)='ACCRUAL_OM' THEN 'ACCRUALS_OM' ELSE 'ACCRUALS' END AS SOURCE_CODE /*Added Flexi Invoicing*/
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN ENGLA_DEBIT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ELSE ENGLA_CREDIT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE END AS REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE  AS OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD 
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN  CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE='CREDIT' THEN 'INV' ELSE 'CM' END
   ELSE  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE     END  AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD 
   
   , NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   --,COALESCE(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
   ,CASE WHEN NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 THEN NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,CASE WHEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY>0 THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ELSE NSOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  END  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  
   ,NART.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
   ,NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
   ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
   ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID  , 'UNKNOWN') 
   ,CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN ENGLA_DEBIT.BK_COMPANY_CODE ELSE ENGLA_CREDIT.BK_COMPANY_CODE END AS BK_COMPANY_CODE
   ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
   ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
   ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD AS ORIG_SS_CD
    ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME    
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER   
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN 
        CASE WHEN NART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE='CREDIT' THEN 'INV' ELSE 'CM' END
	ELSE CASE WHEN  (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL'  AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' ) THEN 'DM' 
							 ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  END 
    END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   
   
   ,NART.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
   
   ,CASE WHEN NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 THEN CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) 
	     ELSE CASE WHEN NART.TSV_TRXL_AMT=0 OR NART.OFFR_ATTR_PCT=0 THEN 0.00
					ELSE  /*ABS((NART.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT+NART.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)/(NART.TSV_TRXL_AMT *(NART.OFFR_ATTR_PCT/100))*100)*/
					ABS((NART.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT+NART.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)/(NART.TSV_TRXL_AMT * (CAST(NART.OFFR_ATTR_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,6))/100))*100)
		      END
	END AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE 	   
   ,NART.POB_TYPE_CD
   ,NART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
   ,NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   ,NART.OFFR_ATTR_PCT  AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT
   FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD ON NART.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT        ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC ON  NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA_DEBIT  ON  ENGLA_DEBIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NART.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA_CREDIT  ON  ENGLA_CREDIT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NART.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
   --INNER JOIN (SELECT UNIQUE_ID,BID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL GROUP BY 1,2) EL 	ON NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM=EL.UNIQUE_ID   
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NART.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY         
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   		
   /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = EL.BID  AND (
				(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NOT NULL) OR NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY<>(-999)))
	*/	  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
   
   WHERE     	NART.REV_RECOG_FLG   = 'N'    AND NART.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'     AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <= 0    
AND NART.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG ='N' /* Added this for Flexible Invoicing change*/
   AND  (NART.AR_TRX_KEY, NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT)    IN 
   (SELECT NART_SUB.AR_TRX_KEY, NART_SUB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NART_SUB.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT
		FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART_SUB
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD      ON NART_SUB.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE  
		WHERE  RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1  AND NART_SUB.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'UNEARNED_REVENUE'
		AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
		 OR (NART_SUB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 )    
		)  
	GROUP BY 1, 2,3 )

SELECT 
   -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
      ,'CG' AS SS_CODE
      ,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
      ,CAST ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
      ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT

	  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC

      OR (NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 )    )

	   )
        THEN COALESCE(TRXLINE.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,-999)
                    ELSE COALESCE(AR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
     END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,AR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
    ,AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    , TRXLINE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
    ,(CASE WHEN SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <0 THEN NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ELSE SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END ) AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,NFC.DEFAULT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    ,AR.BK_DEAL_ID
    ,AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
    ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    ,-999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
    ,EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
    ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
    ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
    ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
    ,CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND AR.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD    /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
    , TRXLINE.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY /*Q3fy16 XAAS Changes*/
    , NATLGD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE/*Q1FY18 SOT XAAS Changes*/
 	FROM 
	    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL   
		INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE TRXLINE     ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=TRXLINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
	  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME = 'MERAKI-LICENSE'  
	--AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='REV' 
	AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE='UNEARN' 
    AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG='N'
   AND NATLGD.SS_CODE ='CG'
   and TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE=100
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY ON NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT       = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
       AND NATLGD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
    INNER JOIN (sel * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1, EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID DESC) = 1  )     	EXDLA       
	ON  EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT                 
          AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME               
          AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'                 
          AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA  
	ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM   AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
          AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID                 
          AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME   
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA   ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID                 
          AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID                 
          AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
          AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )   
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB    ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID                 AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    
  /*  AND TRXLINE.RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG = 'N'  
 Commented here as part of Meraki changes and moved this filter to where condiion */
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX AR ON AR.AR_TRX_KEY = TRXLINE.AR_TRX_KEY 
   
    /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=AR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE                 
         AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                 
         AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = AR.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC ON NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND  NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
    
   /*Q1FY15 OA */ 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY_CUR 
   ON RFMY_CUR.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=-1
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC                 
    ON AR.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE                               
    AND AR.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
    ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
    AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
    
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID) 

       AND AR.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' )
	   
      AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('PP-XAAS','PP-TAX-I-XAAS','PP-CMAPP-XAAS','PP-TAX-CM-XAAS','PP-TAX-DM-XAAS')
    AND NOT EXISTS 
		 (SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
			FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT 
            WHERE NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
			AND NATLGD.SS_CODE = NMRT.SS_CD 
          AND NMRT.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE')
